description: Legal document in Arabic script. Dated 2 Ṣ[afar] 1248 AH which is 1832 CE. Part of a pair with BL OR 10655.24. There are multiple signatures at the bottom as well as a seal. ASE.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בכתב ערבי. תאריך: 2 ص[פר] 1248 הִג'ְרִי = 1832. צמד עם BL OR 10655.24. חתימות רבות וחותמת.
